entry.title: Re: Flexible Programming model - Issue in Transition betw...
entry.content:
Hi,

I am assuming this is in a Fiori elements OData V4 context. If so: In the custom page, do you make use of the chart building block? If yes, I see this as a bug - please open a SNOW ticket against CA-UI5-FE with all the usual details (URL, connections & credentials, steps to recreate,...) and we will look into it.

Best Regards,

   Sandeep

entry.title: Re: Fiscal year variant mandatory
entry.content: in that case check in OMSA whether both the plants have same field reference. if it is different fields statuses can be different . in OMS9 new field references can be created.

entry.title: Re: Digital Skills Initiative Applicant Guide (For self-study candidates)
entry.content: good

entry.title: Re: We had installed our SSL certificate for RMK in June....
entry.content: It was hosted on Chicago(CH1). But now it has been moved to DC68.

entry.title: Re: Risk class update in mass from BAPI or any other tool...
entry.content:
Hi,

depending on version (Cloud or On premise).

Cloud: please use the Mass Maintenance of Business Patners (App: "Manage Mass Maintenance - Business Partners") to manage the mass change. The field in scope would be:

UKMBP_CMS-RISK_CLASS

 

Please also see the solved Community Questions regarding mass change / updates to Credit Management Master Data (although they concentrate on a different field, the process might apply):

https://community.sap.com/t5/enterprise-resource-planning-q-a/fscm-ukm-mass-upd2/qaq-p/6852722

https://community.sap.com/t5/enterprise-resource-planning-q-a/mass-change-of-risk-category-field/qaq-p/8660678/comment-id/2814669#M2814669

 

Hope this helps,

Best regards

entry.title: Re: Mass Change Active Materials Type - All materials ROH - FERT
entry.content:
Seeing the limited amount of materials you have I would not go through the hassle of archiving them but only block the usage of them. My advise would be to do this via material statuses (either on material level or plant material level) maybe in combination with distribution chain statuses. This would block all use of the materials in logistic processes. Material statuses can be set via the mass change transactions for material master.

Note that making use of deletion indicators is not really doing something if you do not set material statuses at the same time. The deletion indicator is an additional indicator that you can set in order to archive materials. In the standard system when setting a deletion indicator the only thing the system does is give a warning message, but all processes can still be performed.

entry.title: Re: We had installed our SSL certificate for RMK in June. Post the DC change in August, we again che
entry.content: It was hosted on Chicago(CH1). But now it has been moved to DC68.

entry.title: Re: How to change the display view for a Queue in SMQ2 in...
entry.content:
Hello,

There is no display program registered for queues.

please have a look at SAP note https://me.sap.com/notes/2818132/E

BR

entry.title: Re: Default account assignment for cost element in FS00
entry.content:
Hello, Which version of SAP is this? Have you tried OKB9 settings? OKB9 has a provision to assign default objects at company code and g/l level.

Thank you!

entry.title: Re: Learning Assignment for Users in Global Assignment (LMS)
entry.content:
Hi Katrina,

I am looking for an answer to the same issue. I am currently working on a project with the same issue. Have you found an answer to this?

Thanks

entry.title: MBEW performance is
entry.content:
Hi,

We are in SAP S4 HANA OP2020 system and we are facing severe performance issue with below select statement. We are passing full primary keys still it takes huge spike on CPU consumption and time consuming statement.

 

IF lt_material[] IS NOT INITIAL
SELECT
  a~matnr,
  a~bwkey,
  a~bwtar,
  a~lbkum,
  a~salk3,
  a~verpr,
  a~zkprs,
  a~timestamp
  FROM mbew AS a
  FOR ALL ENTRIES IN _material
  WHERE a~matnr EQ _material-matnr AND
        a~bwkey IN _t001w_rg AND "This is range for BWKEY
        a~bwtar IN _bwtar  " This is range for BWTAR
INTO TABLE (lt_mbew_tab_n1).
ENDIF.

 


For example: if LT_MATERIAL has 1000 Records it takes 5 seconds to fetch data and when LT_MATERIAL has 10000 Records then it take 12 Seconds to fetch data. It is not good that a select statement is going for 5 seconds or 12 seconds.
 
One thing to notice here is table MBEW is having huge number of records in our system(no of records: 2662533622 i.e more than ~2500 Million records). Data volume could be one of the reason why performance is poor here.

1. But we would to know what SAP suggest in this case when MBEW has these many records?
2. Even though we are passing full key CPU load is really high and it is time consuming select statement?
3. Does SAP recommend to Archive MBEW table data?

P.S: We looked into MBEW it is having Replacement object MBV_MBEW(which is a CDS view MBV_MBEW) that means data is anyway pushed down to HANA DB still it has this performance issue.

Regards,
Prince

entry.title: How to transfer MASTER RECIPE with MIC inside from ECC to S4HANA through Idoc
entry.content:
Hi all.

I am trying to migrate PP data from ECC to S4HANA and have a lot of issues of MASTER RECIPE (not Routing). I established the connection between both systems, I have created partner profile and distribution model. I am using message type LOIROU (it seems this is only support for Routing, please clarify me if I am wrong).

Idoc generated successfully and sent from ECC to S4HANA but cannot post. I checked the IDOC sent from ECC and found that some information are missed  such as MIC in each phase, no destination. I wonder that whether SAP support for MASTER RECIPE or NOT. Most of answer in this community is solved for ROUTING only. Need your help to clarify me how to transfer, what message type.... I saw that LTMC template of MASTER RECIPE not include MIC inside and though that SAP is not support for MASTER RECIPE.

Please help. Thank you.

entry.title: Re: How to get the multiple include option for filter fie...
entry.content:
Hi @junwu, Please find the below for metadata.xml and local annotations that is used in this UI5.

Automatic metadata.xml for list report from BAS:

<edmx:Edmx xmlns:edmx="http://docs.oasis-open.org/odata/ns/edmx" Version="4.0">
<edmx:Reference Uri="https://sap.github.io/odata-vocabularies/vocabularies/Common.xml">
<edmx:Include Namespace="com.sap.vocabularies.Common.v1" Alias="Common"/>
</edmx:Reference>
<edmx:Reference Uri="https://sap.github.io/odata-vocabularies/vocabularies/UI.xml">
<edmx:Include Namespace="com.sap.vocabularies.UI.v1" Alias="UI"/>
</edmx:Reference>
<edmx:Reference Uri="https://sap.github.io/odata-vocabularies/vocabularies/Communication.xml">
<edmx:Include Namespace="com.sap.vocabularies.Communication.v1" Alias="Communication"/>
</edmx:Reference>
<edmx:Reference Uri="/sap/opu/odata4/sap/zsb_bpsupplier_report/srvd/sap/zsd_bpsupplier_report/0001/$metadata">
<edmx:Include Namespace="com.sap.gateway.srvd.zsd_bpsupplier_report.v0001" Alias="SAP__self"/>
</edmx:Reference>
<edmx:DataServices>
<Schema xmlns="http://docs.oasis-open.org/odata/ns/edm" Namespace="local">
</Schema>
</edmx:DataServices>
</edmx:Edmx>

 

Local annotations from CDS metadata extension:

<?xml version="1.0" encoding="utf-8" ?>
<edmx:Edmx Version="4.0" xmlns:edmx="http://docs.oasis-open.org/odata/ns/edmx" xmlns="http://docs.oasis-open.org/odata/ns/edm">
<edmx:Reference Uri="/sap/opu/odata/IWFND/CATALOGSERVICE;v=2/Vocabularies(TechnicalName='%2FIWBEP%2FVOC_COMMUNICATION',Version='0001',SAP__Origin='LOCAL')/$value">
<edmx:Include Namespace="com.sap.vocabularies.Communication.v1" Alias="Communication" />
</edmx:Reference>
<edmx:Reference Uri="/sap/opu/odata/IWFND/CATALOGSERVICE;v=2/Vocabularies(TechnicalName='%2FIWBEP%2FVOC_PERSONALDATA',Version='0001',SAP__Origin='LOCAL')/$value">
<edmx:Include Namespace="com.sap.vocabularies.PersonalData.v1" Alias="PersonalData" />
</edmx:Reference>
<edmx:Reference Uri="/sap/opu/odata/IWFND/CATALOGSERVICE;v=2/Vocabularies(TechnicalName='%2FIWBEP%2FVOC_ANALYTICS',Version='0001',SAP__Origin='LOCAL')/$value">
<edmx:Include Namespace="com.sap.vocabularies.Analytics.v1" Alias="Analytics" />
</edmx:Reference>
<edmx:Reference Uri="/sap/opu/odata/IWFND/CATALOGSERVICE;v=2/Vocabularies(TechnicalName='%2FIWBEP%2FVOC_COMMON',Version='0001',SAP__Origin='LOCAL')/$value">
<edmx:Include Namespace="com.sap.vocabularies.Common.v1" Alias="SAP__common" />
</edmx:Reference>
<edmx:Reference Uri="/sap/opu/odata/IWFND/CATALOGSERVICE;v=2/Vocabularies(TechnicalName='%2FIWBEP%2FVOC_MEASURES',Version='0001',SAP__Origin='LOCAL')/$value">
<edmx:Include Namespace="Org.OData.Measures.V1" Alias="SAP__measures" />
</edmx:Reference>
<edmx:Reference Uri="/sap/opu/odata/IWFND/CATALOGSERVICE;v=2/Vocabularies(TechnicalName='%2FIWBEP%2FVOC_CORE',Version='0001',SAP__Origin='LOCAL')/$value">
<edmx:Include Namespace="Org.OData.Core.V1" Alias="SAP__core" />
</edmx:Reference>
<edmx:Reference Uri="/sap/opu/odata/IWFND/CATALOGSERVICE;v=2/Vocabularies(TechnicalName='%2FIWBEP%2FVOC_CAPABILITIES',Version='0001',SAP__Origin='LOCAL')/$value">
<edmx:Include Namespace="Org.OData.Capabilities.V1" Alias="SAP__capabilities" />
</edmx:Reference>
<edmx:Reference Uri="/sap/opu/odata/IWFND/CATALOGSERVICE;v=2/Vocabularies(TechnicalName='%2FIWBEP%2FVOC_AGGREGATION',Version='0001',SAP__Origin='LOCAL')/$value">
<edmx:Include Namespace="Org.OData.Aggregation.V1" Alias="SAP__aggregation" />
</edmx:Reference>
<edmx:Reference Uri="/sap/opu/odata/IWFND/CATALOGSERVICE;v=2/Vocabularies(TechnicalName='%2FIWBEP%2FVOC_VALIDATION',Version='0001',SAP__Origin='LOCAL')/$value">
<edmx:Include Namespace="Org.OData.Validation.V1" Alias="SAP__validation" />
</edmx:Reference>
<edmx:Reference Uri="/sap/opu/odata/IWFND/CATALOGSERVICE;v=2/Vocabularies(TechnicalName='%2FIWBEP%2FVOC_CODELIST',Version='0001',SAP__Origin='LOCAL')/$value">
<edmx:Include Namespace="com.sap.vocabularies.CodeList.v1" Alias="SAP__CodeList" />
</edmx:Reference>
<edmx:Reference Uri="/sap/opu/odata/IWFND/CATALOGSERVICE;v=2/Vocabularies(TechnicalName='%2FIWBEP%2FVOC_UI',Version='0001',SAP__Origin='LOCAL')/$value">
<edmx:Include Namespace="com.sap.vocabularies.UI.v1" Alias="SAP__UI" />
</edmx:Reference>
<edmx:Reference Uri="/sap/opu/odata/IWFND/CATALOGSERVICE;v=2/Vocabularies(TechnicalName='%2FIWBEP%2FVOC_HTML5',Version='0001',SAP__Origin='LOCAL')/$value">
<edmx:Include Namespace="com.sap.vocabularies.HTML5.v1" Alias="SAP__HTML5" />
</edmx:Reference>
<edmx:Reference Uri="/sap/opu/odata/IWFND/CATALOGSERVICE;v=2/Vocabularies(TechnicalName='%2FIWBEP%2FVOC_PDF',Version='0001',SAP__Origin='LOCAL')/$value">
<edmx:Include Namespace="com.sap.vocabularies.PDF.v1" Alias="SAP__PDF" />
</edmx:Reference>
<edmx:Reference Uri="/sap/opu/odata/IWFND/CATALOGSERVICE;v=2/Vocabularies(TechnicalName='%2FIWBEP%2FVOC_SESSION',Version='0001',SAP__Origin='LOCAL')/$value">
<edmx:Include Namespace="com.sap.vocabularies.Session.v1" Alias="SAP__session" />
</edmx:Reference>
<edmx:DataServices>
<Schema Namespace="com.sap.gateway.srvd.zsd_bpsupplier_report.v0001" Alias="SAP__self">
<Annotation Term="SAP__core.SchemaVersion" String="1.0.0" />
<EntityType Name="supplierHeader">
<Key>
<PropertyRef Name="businessPartner" />
</Key>
<Property Name="businessPartner" Type="Edm.String" Nullable="false" MaxLength="10" />
<Property Name="buGroup" Type="Edm.String" Nullable="false" MaxLength="4" />
<Property Name="oldCustNumber" Type="Edm.String" Nullable="false" MaxLength="10" />
<Property Name="oldVendNumber" Type="Edm.String" Nullable="false" MaxLength="10" />
<Property Name="dunsNumber" Type="Edm.String" Nullable="false" MaxLength="25" />
<Property Name="dlvFlag" Type="Edm.String" Nullable="false" MaxLength="1" />
<Property Name="firstName" Type="Edm.String" Nullable="false" MaxLength="50" />
<Property Name="lastName" Type="Edm.String" Nullable="false" MaxLength="50" />
<Property Name="city" Type="Edm.String" Nullable="false" MaxLength="40" />
<Property Name="country" Type="Edm.String" Nullable="false" MaxLength="3" />
<Property Name="taxNumber" Type="Edm.String" Nullable="false" MaxLength="100" />
<Property Name="tradingPartner" Type="Edm.String" Nullable="false" MaxLength="6" />
<Property Name="role" Type="Edm.String" Nullable="false" MaxLength="100" />
<Property Name="SAP__Messages" Type="Collection(com.sap.gateway.srvd.zsd_bpsupplier_report.v0001.SAP__Message)" Nullable="false" />
</EntityType>
<EntityType Name="I_CountryVHType">
<Key>
<PropertyRef Name="Country" />
</Key>
<Property Name="Country" Type="Edm.String" Nullable="false" MaxLength="3" />
<Property Name="Country_Text" Type="Edm.String" Nullable="false" MaxLength="50" />
<Property Name="Description" Type="Edm.String" Nullable="false" MaxLength="50" />
<Property Name="CountryThreeLetterISOCode" Type="Edm.String" Nullable="false" MaxLength="3" />
<Property Name="CountryThreeDigitISOCode" Type="Edm.String" Nullable="false" MaxLength="3" />
</EntityType>
<ComplexType Name="SAP__Message">
<Property Name="code" Type="Edm.String" Nullable="false" />
<Property Name="message" Type="Edm.String" Nullable="false" />
<Property Name="target" Type="Edm.String" />
<Property Name="additionalTargets" Type="Collection(Edm.String)" Nullable="false" />
<Property Name="transition" Type="Edm.Boolean" Nullable="false" />
<Property Name="numericSeverity" Type="Edm.Byte" Nullable="false" />
<Property Name="longtextUrl" Type="Edm.String" />
</ComplexType>
<Action Name="changeSelection" EntitySetPath="_it" IsBound="true">
<Parameter Name="_it" Type="Collection(com.sap.gateway.srvd.zsd_bpsupplier_report.v0001.supplierHeader)" Nullable="false" />
<Parameter Name="searchType" Type="Edm.String" Nullable="false" MaxLength="50" />
<ReturnType Type="com.sap.gateway.srvd.zsd_bpsupplier_report.v0001.supplierHeader" Nullable="false" />
</Action>
<EntityContainer Name="Container">
<EntitySet Name="I_CountryVH" EntityType="com.sap.gateway.srvd.zsd_bpsupplier_report.v0001.I_CountryVHType" />
<EntitySet Name="supplierHeaderSet" EntityType="com.sap.gateway.srvd.zsd_bpsupplier_report.v0001.supplierHeader" />
</EntityContainer>
<Annotations Target="SAP__self.supplierHeader/businessPartner">
<Annotation Term="SAP__common.Label" String="Busines Partner" />
<Annotation Term="SAP__common.IsUpperCase" />
<Annotation Term="SAP__common.Heading" String="Business Partner" />
<Annotation Term="SAP__common.QuickInfo" String="Business Partner Number" />
</Annotations>
<Annotations Target="SAP__self.supplierHeader/buGroup">
<Annotation Term="SAP__common.Label" String="BP Group" />
<Annotation Term="SAP__common.IsUpperCase" />
<Annotation Term="SAP__common.Heading" String="Grp." />
<Annotation Term="SAP__common.QuickInfo" String="Business Partner Grouping" />
</Annotations>
<Annotations Target="SAP__self.supplierHeader/oldCustNumber">
<Annotation Term="SAP__common.Label" String="Old Customer" />
</Annotations>
<Annotations Target="SAP__self.supplierHeader/oldVendNumber">
<Annotation Term="SAP__common.Label" String="Old Vendor" />
</Annotations>
<Annotations Target="SAP__self.supplierHeader/dunsNumber">
<Annotation Term="SAP__common.Label" String="DUNS Number" />
</Annotations>
<Annotations Target="SAP__self.supplierHeader/dlvFlag">
<Annotation Term="SAP__common.Label" String="DLV Flag" />
</Annotations>
<Annotations Target="SAP__self.supplierHeader/firstName">
<Annotation Term="SAP__common.Label" String="First Name" />
<Annotation Term="SAP__common.Heading" String="Business Partner Name" />
<Annotation Term="SAP__common.QuickInfo" String="Description of a Business Partner" />
</Annotations>
<Annotations Target="SAP__self.supplierHeader/lastName">
<Annotation Term="SAP__common.Label" String="Last Name" />
<Annotation Term="SAP__common.Heading" String="Business Partner Name" />
<Annotation Term="SAP__common.QuickInfo" String="Description of a Business Partner" />
</Annotations>
<Annotations Target="SAP__self.supplierHeader/city">
<Annotation Term="SAP__common.Label" String="City" />
<Annotation Term="SAP__common.Heading" String="City" />
<Annotation Term="SAP__common.QuickInfo" String="City" />
</Annotations>
<Annotations Target="SAP__self.supplierHeader/country">
<Annotation Term="SAP__common.Label" String="Country" />
<Annotation Term="SAP__common.IsUpperCase" />
<Annotation Term="SAP__common.ValueListReferences">
<Collection>
<String>../../../../srvd_f4/sap/i_countryvh/0001;ps='srvd-zsd_bpsupplier_report-0001';va='com.sap.gateway.srvd.zsd_bpsupplier_report.v0001.et-zptp_ddl_c_supplier_report.country'/$metadata</String>
</Collection>
</Annotation>
<Annotation Term="SAP__common.Heading" String="C/R" />
<Annotation Term="SAP__common.QuickInfo" String="Country/Region Key" />
</Annotations>
<Annotations Target="SAP__self.supplierHeader/taxNumber">
<Annotation Term="SAP__common.Label" String="Tax Number" />
</Annotations>
<Annotations Target="SAP__self.supplierHeader/tradingPartner">
<Annotation Term="SAP__common.IsUpperCase" />
<Annotation Term="SAP__common.Label" String="Trading Partner No." />
<Annotation Term="SAP__common.Heading" String="Tr.Prt" />
<Annotation Term="SAP__common.QuickInfo" String="Company ID of Trading Partner" />
</Annotations>
<Annotations Target="SAP__self.changeSelection(Collection(SAP__self.supplierHeader))/searchType">
<Annotation Term="SAP__common.Label" String="Select Business Partner By" />
<Annotation Term="SAP__common.ValueListReferences">
<Collection>
<String>../../../../srvd_f4/sap/i_domainfixedvalue/0001;ps='srvd-zsd_bpsupplier_report-0001';va='com.sap.gateway.srvd.zsd_bpsupplier_report.v0001.ae-zptp_ddl_c_supplier_report.changeselection.searchtype.supplierHeader.X'/$metadata</String>
</Collection>
</Annotation>
</Annotations>
<Annotations Target="SAP__self.supplierHeader">
<Annotation Term="SAP__common.Label" String="Search Supplier" />
<Annotation Term="SAP__common.SemanticKey">
<Collection>
<PropertyPath>businessPartner</PropertyPath>
</Collection>
</Annotation>
<Annotation Term="SAP__UI.HeaderInfo">
<Record>
<PropertyValue Property="TypeName" String="Search Supplier" />
<PropertyValue Property="TypeNamePlural" String="Supplier List" />
<PropertyValue Property="Title">
<Record Type="SAP__UI.DataField">
<PropertyValue Property="Label" String="BP Supplier Report" />
</Record>
</PropertyValue>
<PropertyValue Property="Description">
<Record Type="SAP__UI.DataField">
<PropertyValue Property="Label" String="BP Suppliers" />
</Record>
</PropertyValue>
</Record>
</Annotation>
<Annotation Term="SAP__UI.LineItem">
<Collection>
<Record Type="SAP__UI.DataField">
<PropertyValue Property="Value" Path="businessPartner" />
<Annotation Term="SAP__HTML5.CssDefaults">
<Record>
<PropertyValue Property="width" String="5rem" />
</Record>
</Annotation>
</Record>
<Record Type="SAP__UI.DataField">
<PropertyValue Property="Label" String="BP Group" />
<PropertyValue Property="Value" Path="buGroup" />
<Annotation Term="SAP__HTML5.CssDefaults">
<Record>
<PropertyValue Property="width" String="5rem" />
</Record>
</Annotation>
</Record>
<Record Type="SAP__UI.DataField">
<PropertyValue Property="Label" String="Old Customer" />
<PropertyValue Property="Value" Path="oldCustNumber" />
<Annotation Term="SAP__HTML5.CssDefaults">
<Record>
<PropertyValue Property="width" String="5rem" />
</Record>
</Annotation>
</Record>
<Record Type="SAP__UI.DataField">
<PropertyValue Property="Label" String="Old Vendor" />
<PropertyValue Property="Value" Path="oldVendNumber" />
<Annotation Term="SAP__HTML5.CssDefaults">
<Record>
<PropertyValue Property="width" String="5rem" />
</Record>
</Annotation>
</Record>
<Record Type="SAP__UI.DataField">
<PropertyValue Property="Label" String="DUNS Number" />
<PropertyValue Property="Value" Path="dunsNumber" />
<Annotation Term="SAP__HTML5.CssDefaults">
<Record>
<PropertyValue Property="width" String="5rem" />
</Record>
</Annotation>
</Record>
<Record Type="SAP__UI.DataField">
<PropertyValue Property="Label" String="DLV Flag" />
<PropertyValue Property="Value" Path="dlvFlag" />
<Annotation Term="SAP__HTML5.CssDefaults">
<Record>
<PropertyValue Property="width" String="5rem" />
</Record>
</Annotation>
</Record>
<Record Type="SAP__UI.DataField">
<PropertyValue Property="Label" String="Last Name" />
<PropertyValue Property="Value" Path="lastName" />
<Annotation Term="SAP__HTML5.CssDefaults">
<Record>
<PropertyValue Property="width" String="5rem" />
</Record>
</Annotation>
</Record>
<Record Type="SAP__UI.DataField">
<PropertyValue Property="Label" String="First Name" />
<PropertyValue Property="Value" Path="firstName" />
<Annotation Term="SAP__HTML5.CssDefaults">
<Record>
<PropertyValue Property="width" String="5rem" />
</Record>
</Annotation>
</Record>
<Record Type="SAP__UI.DataField">
<PropertyValue Property="Label" String="City" />
<PropertyValue Property="Value" Path="city" />
<Annotation Term="SAP__HTML5.CssDefaults">
<Record>
<PropertyValue Property="width" String="5rem" />
</Record>
</Annotation>
</Record>
<Record Type="SAP__UI.DataField">
<PropertyValue Property="Label" String="Tax Number" />
<PropertyValue Property="Value" Path="taxNumber" />
<Annotation Term="SAP__HTML5.CssDefaults">
<Record>
<PropertyValue Property="width" String="5rem" />
</Record>
</Annotation>
</Record>
<Record Type="SAP__UI.DataField">
<PropertyValue Property="Label" String="Trading Partner" />
<PropertyValue Property="Value" Path="tradingPartner" />
<Annotation Term="SAP__HTML5.CssDefaults">
<Record>
<PropertyValue Property="width" String="5rem" />
</Record>
</Annotation>
</Record>
<Record Type="SAP__UI.DataField">
<PropertyValue Property="Label" String="BP Role" />
<PropertyValue Property="Value" Path="role" />
<Annotation Term="SAP__HTML5.CssDefaults">
<Record>
<PropertyValue Property="width" String="10rem" />
</Record>
</Annotation>
</Record>
</Collection>
</Annotation>
<Annotation Term="SAP__UI.SelectionFields">
<Collection>
<PropertyPath>businessPartner</PropertyPath>
<PropertyPath>oldCustNumber</PropertyPath>
<PropertyPath>oldVendNumber</PropertyPath>
<PropertyPath>dunsNumber</PropertyPath>
<PropertyPath>dlvFlag</PropertyPath>
<PropertyPath>firstName</PropertyPath>
<PropertyPath>lastName</PropertyPath>
<PropertyPath>city</PropertyPath>
<PropertyPath>country</PropertyPath>
<PropertyPath>taxNumber</PropertyPath>
</Collection>
</Annotation>
<Annotation Term="SAP__common.Messages" Path="SAP__Messages" />
</Annotations>
<Annotations Target="SAP__self.Container/supplierHeaderSet">
<Annotation Term="SAP__capabilities.SearchRestrictions">
<Record>
<PropertyValue Property="Searchable" Bool="false" />
</Record>
</Annotation>
<Annotation Term="SAP__capabilities.FilterRestrictions">
<Record>
<PropertyValue Property="Filterable" Bool="true" />
<PropertyValue Property="FilterExpressionRestrictions">
<Collection>
<Record>
<PropertyValue Property="Property" PropertyPath="businessPartner" />
<PropertyValue Property="AllowedExpressions" String="MultiValue" />
</Record>
<Record>
<PropertyValue Property="Property" PropertyPath="oldCustNumber" />
<PropertyValue Property="AllowedExpressions" String="MultiValue" />
</Record>
<Record>
<PropertyValue Property="Property" PropertyPath="oldVendNumber" />
<PropertyValue Property="AllowedExpressions" String="MultiValue" />
</Record>
<Record>
<PropertyValue Property="Property" PropertyPath="dunsNumber" />
<PropertyValue Property="AllowedExpressions" String="MultiValue" />
</Record>
<Record>
<PropertyValue Property="Property" PropertyPath="dlvFlag" />
<PropertyValue Property="AllowedExpressions" String="MultiValue" />
</Record>
<Record>
<PropertyValue Property="Property" PropertyPath="firstName" />
<PropertyValue Property="AllowedExpressions" String="MultiValue" />
</Record>
<Record>
<PropertyValue Property="Property" PropertyPath="lastName" />
<PropertyValue Property="AllowedExpressions" String="MultiValue" />
</Record>
<Record>
<PropertyValue Property="Property" PropertyPath="city" />
<PropertyValue Property="AllowedExpressions" String="MultiValue" />
</Record>
<Record>
<PropertyValue Property="Property" PropertyPath="country" />
<PropertyValue Property="AllowedExpressions" String="MultiValue" />
</Record>
<Record>
<PropertyValue Property="Property" PropertyPath="taxNumber" />
<PropertyValue Property="AllowedExpressions" String="MultiValue" />
</Record>
</Collection>
</PropertyValue>
</Record>
</Annotation>
<Annotation Term="SAP__capabilities.InsertRestrictions">
<Record>
<PropertyValue Property="Insertable" Bool="false" />
</Record>
</Annotation>
<Annotation Term="SAP__capabilities.DeleteRestrictions">
<Record>
<PropertyValue Property="Deletable" Bool="false" />
</Record>
</Annotation>
<Annotation Term="SAP__capabilities.UpdateRestrictions">
<Record>
<PropertyValue Property="Updatable" Bool="false" />
<PropertyValue Property="QueryOptions">
<Record>
<PropertyValue Property="SelectSupported" Bool="true" />
</Record>
</PropertyValue>
</Record>
</Annotation>
<Annotation Term="SAP__core.OptimisticConcurrency">
<Collection />
</Annotation>
</Annotations>
<Annotations Target="SAP__self.I_CountryVHType/Country">
<Annotation Term="SAP__common.Text" Path="Country_Text" />
<Annotation Term="SAP__common.IsUpperCase" />
<Annotation Term="SAP__common.Label" String="Country/Region Key" />
<Annotation Term="SAP__common.Heading" String="C/R" />
</Annotations>
<Annotations Target="SAP__self.I_CountryVHType/Country_Text">
<Annotation Term="SAP__core.Computed" />
<Annotation Term="SAP__common.Label" String="Country/Region Name" />
</Annotations>
<Annotations Target="SAP__self.I_CountryVHType/CountryThreeLetterISOCode">
<Annotation Term="SAP__common.IsUpperCase" />
<Annotation Term="SAP__common.Label" String="ISO Code 3 Char" />
<Annotation Term="SAP__common.Heading" String="ISO Code 3 Characters" />
<Annotation Term="SAP__common.QuickInfo" String="ISO Country/Region Code 3 Characters" />
</Annotations>
<Annotations Target="SAP__self.I_CountryVHType/CountryThreeDigitISOCode">
<Annotation Term="SAP__common.IsDigitSequence" />
<Annotation Term="SAP__common.Label" String="ISO Code Num. 3" />
<Annotation Term="SAP__common.Heading" String="ISO Code Numeric 3-Characters" />
<Annotation Term="SAP__common.QuickInfo" String="ISO Country/Region Code Numeric 3-Characters" />
</Annotations>
<Annotations Target="SAP__self.I_CountryVHType">
<Annotation Term="SAP__common.Label" String="Country/Region" />
</Annotations>
<Annotations Target="SAP__self.Container/I_CountryVH">
<Annotation Term="SAP__capabilities.SearchRestrictions">
<Record>
<PropertyValue Property="Searchable" Bool="true" />
<PropertyValue Property="UnsupportedExpressions" EnumMember="SAP__capabilities.SearchExpressions/AND SAP__capabilities.SearchExpressions/OR SAP__capabilities.SearchExpressions/NOT SAP__capabilities.SearchExpressions/group SAP__capabilities.SearchExpressions/phrase" />
</Record>
</Annotation>
<Annotation Term="SAP__capabilities.InsertRestrictions">
<Record>
<PropertyValue Property="Insertable" Bool="false" />
</Record>
</Annotation>
<Annotation Term="SAP__capabilities.DeleteRestrictions">
<Record>
<PropertyValue Property="Deletable" Bool="false" />
</Record>
</Annotation>
<Annotation Term="SAP__capabilities.UpdateRestrictions">
<Record>
<PropertyValue Property="Updatable" Bool="false" />
<PropertyValue Property="QueryOptions">
<Record>
<PropertyValue Property="SelectSupported" Bool="true" />
</Record>
</PropertyValue>
</Record>
</Annotation>
<Annotation Term="SAP__core.OptimisticConcurrency">
<Collection />
</Annotation>
<Annotation Term="SAP__capabilities.FilterRestrictions">
<Record>
<PropertyValue Property="FilterExpressionRestrictions">
<Collection>
<Record>
<PropertyValue Property="Property" PropertyPath="Country" />
<PropertyValue Property="AllowedExpressions" String="MultiValue" />
</Record>
<Record>
<PropertyValue Property="Property" PropertyPath="CountryThreeLetterISOCode" />
<PropertyValue Property="AllowedExpressions" String="MultiValue" />
</Record>
</Collection>
</PropertyValue>
</Record>
</Annotation>
</Annotations>
<Annotations Target="SAP__self.Container">
<Annotation Term="SAP__aggregation.ApplySupported">
<Record>
<PropertyValue Property="Transformations">
<Collection>
<String>aggregate</String>
<String>groupby</String>
<String>filter</String>
</Collection>
</PropertyValue>
<PropertyValue Property="Rollup" EnumMember="SAP__aggregation.RollupType/None" />
</Record>
</Annotation>
<Annotation Term="SAP__common.ApplyMultiUnitBehaviorForSortingAndFiltering" Bool="true" />
<Annotation Term="SAP__capabilities.FilterFunctions">
<Collection>
<String>eq</String>
<String>ne</String>
<String>gt</String>
<String>ge</String>
<String>lt</String>
<String>le</String>
<String>and</String>
<String>or</String>
<String>contains</String>
<String>startswith</String>
<String>endswith</String>
<String>any</String>
<String>all</String>
</Collection>
</Annotation>
<Annotation Term="SAP__capabilities.SupportedFormats">
<Collection>
<String>application/json</String>
<String>application/pdf</String>
</Collection>
</Annotation>
<Annotation Term="SAP__PDF.Features">
<Record>
<PropertyValue Property="DocumentDescriptionReference" String="../../../../default/iwbep/common/0001/$metadata" />
<PropertyValue Property="DocumentDescriptionCollection" String="MyDocumentDescriptions" />
<PropertyValue Property="ArchiveFormat" Bool="true" />
<PropertyValue Property="Border" Bool="true" />
<PropertyValue Property="CoverPage" Bool="true" />
<PropertyValue Property="FitToPage" Bool="true" />
<PropertyValue Property="FontName" Bool="true" />
<PropertyValue Property="FontSize" Bool="true" />
<PropertyValue Property="Margin" Bool="true" />
<PropertyValue Property="Signature" Bool="true" />
<PropertyValue Property="ResultSizeDefault" Int="20000" />
<PropertyValue Property="ResultSizeMaximum" Int="20000" />
</Record>
</Annotation>
</Annotations>
<Annotations Target="SAP__self.I_CountryVHType/Description">
<Annotation Term="SAP__UI.Hidden" />
<Annotation Term="SAP__common.Label" String="Country/Region Name" />
</Annotations>
</Schema>
</edmx:DataServices>
</edmx:Edmx>

entry.title: Re: F110 Proposal workflow.
entry.content: Have you tried building that workflow in BTP?

entry.title: How to fill the program RFIDPTFO10 field Further restrictions?
entry.content:
Hello,
How should I fill out the field with further restrictions on the reference amount? I filled in the value of 5.0000€, but the report shows the vendors with minor values.

Thanks.

entry.title: 🟢 DevOps with SAP BTP ABAP Environment
entry.content: Learn about git-based customer lifecycle management (LM) on SAP BTP ABAP Environment which aims to combine proven and reliable ABAP LM benefits with the git-based CI/CD approach familiar to many. Watch live demos of our latest features and get an outlook on future developments.

entry.title: Re: Multiple Quality Bins - One for Recieving and one for production
entry.content: Should be doable. Although both are a 101 movement type there is an indicator if it's from purchase orders or production/process orders. Inspection types are also different (respectively 01 or 1701 and 04 or 1704). This should be enough to split the two processes.

entry.title: Re: Flexible Programming Model sap.fe.macro.Table - chang...
entry.content:
Hi,

Not yet 😉 but hopefully will come soon!

Best Regards,

   Sandeep

entry.title: Re: SBPA: Decision step in Process fails with error destination 'bpmworkflowruntime_rule' not found
entry.content: I'm facing the same problem.

entry.title: Re: EWM Data Management in a Nutshell
entry.content: Great blog Ahmed.

entry.title: Re: Error: (GLT2 201) Balancing field "Profit Center " in...
entry.content:
you may have document splitting enabled and the application is not able to derive or inherit a profit center for the bank GL

in FAGL3KEH txn maintain default profit centers for bank GLs. It should work.

you should NOT make the message  as a warning , though it can also work but not in a good way.

entry.title: Re: Welcome Touchpoint - Building side-by-side extensions on SAP BTP
entry.content:
Hello @markushaug ,

I've been trying to complete this tutorial for a while: https://learning.sap.com/learning-journeys/build-side-by-side-extensions-on-sap-btp/exercise-perform...

I've started from scratch many times, but I always encounter the same error. Everything works correctly until I deploy the application.

After assigning the 'RiskManager' role to my user, I go to the Applications section in my SAP BTP cockpit. I choose the risk-management application:

 

When I click on the application route, I get this:

 

And when I access locally, this is what I get:

 

 

 

I have already tried to do it by clearing the cache and from an incognito window, but it gives the same error.

Prior to deployment, the application worked fine locally.

Thank you in advance.

entry.title: Re: $value coming as document header in browser while ope...
entry.content: Did you ever find a solution to this? I'm facing the same issue

entry.title: Error P014: Activation of Cloud Integration capability has failed.
entry.content:
Hello SAP.

I am taking the https://training.sap.com/certification/c_cpi_2404-sap-certified-associate---integration-developer-g/?.

Following this guide and things are working fine: https://developers.sap.com/tutorials/hcp-create-trial-account.html

Then I am trying to set up the Integration Suit Trial following this guide: https://developers.sap.com/tutorials/cp-starter-isuite-onboard-subscribe..html

In step four, I am trying to add the cloud integration capability and getting the error as seen in image 104056.

I also tried to access SAP Note 2904202: 

when redirected to 2904202, it is empty as in image 105038.

I have been unable to find anything with a similar errortype in the community.

I have tried to delete all subscriptions and then resubscribe them. I have also tried to removed all entitlements and give them again with any success.

As a last resort a tried deleting the entire trial and start a new and end up with the same error P014: Activation of cloud integration capability has failed.

entry.title: Re: Web Client not able to open attachment and attach doc...
entry.content:
Hi,

Please check the Web client highlights

https://help.sap.com/doc/1e149715909a4d8ea8920df5513eb64c/10.0/en-US/SAP_Business_One_10.0_Highlights.pdf

Supported since 10.0 FP2208 Webclient. Please check.

Kr,

Jitin

entry.title: Re: Welcome Touchpoint - Building side-by-side extensions on SAP BTP
entry.content:
Hi @InesRomero 

I would like to encourage to always use our Q&A area to post your questions
This makes it easier to follow-up:
Our SAP Learning Experts will get back to you as soon as possible! We are here to support you.

That way other learners can benefit from the answer:
If you ask the question there other learners  can search for it in the future if they run into the same issue and there we have more features available for responses

Would you mind to repost it ?
Kind regards
Margit

entry.title: Re: Change technical object migration cockpit
entry.content:
Agreed, but case is:- i have uploaded Equipment Master data and now i need to update/change model of all equipment's (model name may differ for individual equipment). now in private cloud, we can use LSMW for specific Tcode and record the migration program and update the necessary values which we want to. But in public cloud--> Migration cockpit has not feature to mass update or change the values is existing Equipment master data.

please can you guide the possible options in public cloud

entry.title: Re: Using Job Scheduler in SAP Cloud Platform [3]: enable OAuth Authorization
entry.content:
Hi,

I'm getting this error. Need some help @ALL

entry.title: Re: Change technical object migration cockpit
entry.content:
hello, Thankyou

IE05 works in SAP Private cloud, IE05 feature not available in public cloud

entry.title: Preferred way of connecting to DB in case of CAP multitenancy
entry.content:
Hi Team,

We are currently using multi tenancy feature from CAP and also using DwC. I have a question on designing HDI schemas for subscriber tenants.
Our project have multiple services that are are using multi tenancy and currently we have a separate service manager for each service. This results in x*y schemas where x is number of services with in an application and y is the number of subscribed tenants.

Is this approach correct ? I believe that in general all services (as long as they are coherent) should share same schema and hence they can use same service manager so that there is only Y number of schemas compared to above alternative.

Could you suggest which approach is better and why ? Thank you.

entry.title: Re: Packaging Specification is not determined after Inbou...
entry.content:
Hi, 
I already followed this blog before posting this thread. Still, no HUs are generated in EWM.

entry.title: Slowness in loading SAC - ODE story contents
entry.content:
Hi Colleagues,

At the beginning of this year,  as department we started conversion of all stories into new Optimized Design Experience mode, we successfully converted all of them  however currently we experience  slowness of content  uploading in some ODE stories, sometimes it becomes worse, we could not work on the stories in editing mode. Furthermore, we've been getting complaints recently. 

What should I do make it faster, I am open any suggestions and idea to solve this issue ASAP.  If it is neede also we can have short call to check issue together

Thanks a lot in advance!

#SAC #SAPanalyticscloud #OptimizedDesignExperience

Best Regards.

Ali Akbalik

entry.title: Batch Characteristics Field Non-Editable
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

One of our Manufacturing client is using Batch Management. We are transferring batch characteristics values from one batch to another batch through Batch Derivation. 

Initially the Batch is created with all the characteristics values & assigned to a production order of a SFG material. Now we are flowing the Batch Characteristics values to the FG production Order through Batch derivation.

The requirement is, once the batch is created & assigned to a production order, few selected batch characteristics values should be non editable in the SFG Production Order as well as when the FG Production Order for which the Batch characteristics are copied through batch derivation.

Please suggest how few values of batch characteristics can be kept non-editable & few values editable. 

 

Regards

Akshay

entry.title: Re: SAP Analytics Cloud – Structured Allocations migration to Data Actions
entry.content:
Hi @lucinda_araujo 

No, standard users cannot manage allocations within data actions. Please refer to the "Features by License Type" section of our help page: 

https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_ANALYTICS_CLOUD/00f68c2e08b941f081002fd3691d86a7/20d92cebb9f94699949f99bd54a169bd.html

entry.title: 🟢 SAP Business Client & SAP GUI - The Journey Continues
entry.content: Transitioning users from SAP GUI to SAP Fiori via integrating the SAP Fiori Launchpad into SAP Business Client to launch native SAP GUI for Windows transactions and Fiori Apps in one-single-entry point from local and remote systems.

entry.title: Re: Custom Field Text from Custom Field and Logic on PO App
entry.content: Hi Junwu,

entry.title: Re: how to update startdate and duedate fields in product...
entry.content:
Hi Y-Yusuf,

The screenshot does not show Start Date on rows.

Also, which date field are you trying to update? Is it in the header or on rows?

Kind regards,

ANKIT CHAUHAN

SAP Business One Support

entry.title: Re: Welcome to the beginner corner!
entry.content:
Hi @David_Chaviano 

My Name is Hashir From Pakistan.i am writing to inform you that i have complete my learning journey and now am ready to take the exam for my selected module,Please share campaign Code.

Thank You for your time.

.

entry.title: Re: Custom Field Text from Custom Field and Logic on PO App
entry.content: Hi Junwu, Thank you for your reply. When we are using the ObjectModel Text ,it is creating additional field in the Custom Field with VH. And it is also throwing an error about the Association.

entry.title: Re: Third party Service Delivery
entry.content:
Hello,

Sales module cannot cover third party service procurement and delivery. Instead, Service module will cover the third party service procurement. Refer to the chapter 4.2.1.1 #5 in the test script for the Scope Item: 3D2

Service Order Management and Monitoring (3D2)
Use item category: SEW1 in a Service Order.
Following procurement steps described in the Scope Item: 3NI
Procurement for Service Management (3NI)
I added the tag for SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition Service.

entry.title: Re: Gl/L account item without tax code in document $1 with deferred taxes
entry.content: Thank you very much Siva, this solved my problem

entry.title: Re: RAP-Create option: Can all fields including key can b...
entry.content:
Hi Sandeep,

Yes. I meant the option "createWithParameterDialog" to show in a dialog. I understand that this feature is currently possible with V2 Odata service. Can we get to know the roadmap by when this feature will be released for V4 as it is already in pipeline?

Thank you.

entry.title: Where can I gain fundamental knowledge SAP Cloud ALM for S/4HANA Cloud with Clean Core?
entry.content:
I recommend to access our Unleashing Value of SAP Cloud ALM for S/4HANA Cloud with Clean Core learning journey.

Overview
This learning journey focuses on the fundamental knowledge of Unleashing Value of SAP Cloud ALM for S/4HANA Cloud with Clean Core. After completing this learning journey, you will be able to execute core implementation project tasks to deploy, adopt, and extend SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition and stick to clean core and post go-live mange the operational tasks and monitor the health of the system.

Learning objectives

  • Discover the value of SAP Cloud ALM and its capabilities.
  • Position SAP Cloud ALM for Sales, Presales, CEE, CSP and TQM.
  • Empower organizations with SAP Cloud ALM for clean core systems.
  • Unlock the value of SAP Cloud ALM for SAP S/4HANA Cloud and across SAP Solutions.

Pass all the quizzes and receive a digital badge
Please ask a question related to the digital learning Journey in the Q&A area.

Our SAP Learning Experts will get back to you as soon as possible! We are here to support you. 

I appreciate your feedback and we will make sure to continue sharing interesting topics.

Kind regards
Margit

entry.title: Move Existing Company Code to Variant
entry.content:
Hi Support,

Could we have the following company code moved to an existing posting period variant within SAP?

Current Variant

Current Company Code

Current Ledger

Move To Variant

22

DIGITS

E1

10

Thank you!

-PERSON_NAME


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: Move Existing Company Code to Variant
entry.content:
Currently, it is not possible to assign company codes to an existing posting period variant in the Cloud, and there is no SSCUI available for this purpose.

you can raise a new feature request for the same.

Kindly make use of the SAP Customer Influence (http://influence.sap.com/).

Would you like to shape & influence future releases of SAP Products?

entry.title: Re: Custom fields not available in manage purchase requisition-professional app
entry.content:
Hi,

have you found solution? I have similar issue.

Thanks.

entry.title: Re: Task 3 - Enhancing CDS View Entities with Annotations
DVM Cockpit: Collective Analysis is repeatedly released and running on the managed system
entry.content:
Need to know what is the significant/benefit of this table analysis? what analysis will it do?


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: DVM Cockpit: Collective Analysis is repeatedly releas...
entry.content:
Regarding Table Analysis Administration - Data Volume Management, please refer to following help document for more information:

https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_Solution_Manager/2280273f45054d318142b271b06a03c1/d5826ee51a9245e499b505dcfb65edc7.html?q=Table%20Analysis

entry.title: Visual Studio 2022 & Crystal Reports 2008
entry.content:
I need to know if it's possible to work with Crystal Reports 2008 files in Visual Studio 2022.

Thank you very much.

entry.title: Rehire visibility for change in legal entity
entry.content:
Hello

I would like to understand how you have managed the rehire process whereby it is required due to a change in legal entity.

Where we rehire an employee into a different company, we require a new employee number to trigger various actions for HMRC.  We would like for the employee to have visibility of their old record (and subsequent payslips), how have you managed this?  

Thanks

entry.title: MDK Application not showing two date picker control side by side in page, what to do?
entry.content:
Hello,

I am currently developing an application using the SAP Mobile Development Kit (MDK). I have encountered an issue where I am unable to display two date picker controls side by side on the same page.

Here are the details of my setup:

MDK Version: 24.7
Device/Platform: Web, Android
Steps to Reproduce:
1)Added two date picker controls to the same page.
2)Tried using "NumberOfColumns" property of FormCellControl as 2 to show two date side by side.
3)In cloud studio it showing two date shows side by side.
4)Despite these efforts, the date pickers still appear one below the other instead of side by side in both web as well as android.

Page Code : 

{
    "Controls": [
        {
            "FilterFeedbackBar": {
                "ShowAllFilters": false,
                "_Type": "Control.Type.FilterFeedbackBar"
            },
            "_Type": "Control.Type.SectionedTable",
            "_Name": "SectionedTable0",
            "Sections": [
                {
                    "Visible": true,
                    "EmptySection": {
                        "FooterVisible": false
                    },
                    "Separators": {
                        "TopSectionSeparator": false,
                        "BottomSectionSeparator": true,
                        "HeaderSeparator": true,
                        "FooterSeparator": true,
                        "ControlSeparator": true
                    },
                    "_Type": "Section.Type.FormCell",
                    "_Name": "SectionFormCell1",
                    "Controls": [
                        {
                            "Value": "Enter Date",
                            "_Type": "Control.Type.FormCell.DatePicker",
                            "_Name": "FormCellDatePicker0",
                            "IsVisible": true,
                            "Separator": true,
                            "Caption": "Start",
                            "IsEditable": true,
                            "Mode": "Date"
                        },
                        {
                            "Value": "Enter Date",
                            "_Type": "Control.Type.FormCell.DatePicker",
                            "_Name": "FormCellDatePicker1",
                            "IsVisible": true,
                            "Separator": true,
                            "Caption": "End",
                            "IsEditable": true,
                            "Mode": "Date"
                        }
                    ],
                    "Layout": {
                        "NumberOfColumns": 2
                    }
                },
                {
                    "_Type": "Section.Type.ButtonTable",
                    "_Name": "SectionButtonTable0",
                    "Visible": true,
                    "EmptySection": {
                        "FooterVisible": false
                    },
                    "Separators": {
                        "TopSectionSeparator": false,
                        "BottomSectionSeparator": true,
                        "HeaderSeparator": true,
                        "FooterSeparator": true,
                        "ControlSeparator": true
                    },
                    "Buttons": [
                        {
                            "_Type": "ButtonTable.Type.Button",
                            "_Name": "ButtonTableTypeButton0",
                            "Title": "Submit",
                            "Alignment": "Center",
                            "ButtonType": "Primary",
                            "Semantic": "Tint",
                            "ImagePosition": "Leading",
                            "FullWidth": true,
                            "Visible": true,
                            "Enabled": true
                        }
                    ],
                    "Layout": {
                        "LayoutType": "Vertical",
                        "HorizontalAlignment": "Leading"
                    }
                }
            ]
        }
    ],
    "_Type": "Page",
    "_Name": "Test",
    "Caption": "Test",
    "PrefersLargeCaption": true
}

Has anyone faced a similar issue or can provide guidance on how to resolve this? Any help or suggestions would be greatly appreciated!

Thank you.

entry.title: 🟢 Tools for Clean ABAP
entry.content:
Clean ABAP helps to write readable, testable and maintainable code. While much of this requires human expertise and team discipline, some aspects can be automated. In this presentation we will show you how ABAP cleaner and the Code Pal checks for the ABAP Test Cockpit can help you to easily integrate the Clean ABAP rules into your development process and give you an update on how ABAP cleaner has evolved since its initial release last year.

Speakers: Bjoern Jueliger and Joerg-Michael Grassau

entry.title: Re: Derive Translation Date from Document Date in Cloud
entry.content:
Hi, 

Did you ever come across a solution for this on S/4 Public Cloud?

I have a requirement for foreign vendor invoices to translate on the document date.

Many Thanks,
Dave

entry.title: Reversal of stock posting after resetting the UD with the Manage usage decision app.
entry.content:
Hi,

I'm aware that we can reset the usage decisions using the "Manage usage decisions" app. But what is the best practice approach for reversing the stock posting?

thanks / Suresh.E

entry.title: Re: Getting number from string?
entry.content:
The proper syntax is:

REPLACE ALL OCCURRENCES OF REGEX '([[:alpha:]])'

entry.title: Re: F110 Proposal workflow.
entry.content:
Hi Daniel,

I am completely raw in this and unknown about BTP. Can you please give me detail steps for this? 

Regards

Zunaid Hingora

entry.title: Re: Triggering side effect on press of Delete button
entry.content:
Side Effect Annotations: Examples - Documentation - Demo Kit - SAPUI5 SDK (ondemand.com)
Do we have a similar way for RAP applications as well?

entry.title: Re: RAP-Create option: Can all fields including key can b...
entry.content:
Hi,

Yes, it's in the pipeline but I cannot commit a timeline! Hopefully we get in the upcoming S/4H wave (2502) i.e. with UI5 version 1.130 - if everything goes fine.

Best Regards,

   Sandeep

entry.title: Re: Environment,Health&Safety(EH&S) management module in SAP
entry.content: https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_S4HANA_ON-PREMISE/1b3596cc5dd5428d887966a4193ddc29/5b22b8d6606b4d32b8af9283901d3bdc.html?state=TEST&version=2023.001

entry.title: Re: Is it possible to add a chart to a fiori elements lis...
entry.content:
Hi,

Your understanding is correct - this is not something we support out of the box with Fiori elements. With Fiori elements for OData V4, this can be achieved using the building blocks within your own custom page though.

If it's not the header where you want the chart but rather charts in the content area or just chart based filters in the header - you might want to check at the standard ALP template we offer!

Best Regards,

   Sandeep

entry.title: Re: Change technical object migration cockpit
entry.content:
There are two options:
1. Use 'Mass Edit Technical Objects' action in the Find Technical Objects app

2. You can use OData API to update the model number of the Equipment. Please see Overview | Equipment | SAP Business Accelerator Hub

We recommend using OData API if the data set is large.

entry.title: Re: Configuration on Asset Management Part 1
entry.content: nice posting

entry.title: 🟢 Major Updates for Embedded Analytics in ABAP Cloud
entry.content:
ABAP Core Data Services (CDS) based embedded analytics provides easy-to-use analytical tooling and allows you to drill down, aggregate, and display data from your core solution modeled with ABAP CDS.
In this session, we present analytical data modeling basics in CDS as well as the new multi-dimensional analysis generator for building native, multi-dimensional SAP Fiori apps on top of the ABAP CDS-based analytical data model.

Speakers : Andreas Riehl and Olivia Baumann

entry.title: Re: Feature Request: Display parent-object for sub-tasks...
entry.content:
Hi,

SAP Cloud ALM feature requests must be logged in the SAP Continuous Influence for SAP Cloud ALM for Implementation program .
Please create an entry for the request there, and include the details of your business case for the feature.


Thanks and regards,
John

entry.title: How to update a boolean field type using determination in Service Cloud version 2?
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

We have created a custom field of the type boolean for our requirement. Now the requirement is the boolean field type should automatically get updated when certain condition is fulfilled. I am using Determinations in Extensibility in Service Cloud V2 for the update. However I am not able to get proper syntax for the field assignment in order to update the value automatically?

I am attaching a screenshot of my Assignment.

Thanks in advance.

entry.title: Re: Number Range for Material Type
entry.content:
Hi Jerrysam,

Please create material type in T code OMS2 if you have not created yet (just copy from standard and rename). This is required first. After that try to create material number range in T code mmnr. In your case, I think you go to configuration help or Interval tab. You'll find change group option (pen icon).

Click that change group icon and you will go to 

Click on create & fill your group name and number range details and click save. 

Once saved, click back & you'll find below page.

Under column 01, you'll find your material type, select it and then click the icon on top (yellow marked in the screenshot) assign element to group.

You'll get below screen. Select your number range and click green tick mark.

Now scroll down the page. You'll find your number range assignment is done successfully.

Hope this helps.

entry.title: Re: Custom CSS for component based UI Integration Cards
entry.content:
Hi Noel, full URL : https://theia-workspaces-ws-q7bls.eu10.applicationstudio.cloud.sap/oss-b48c39a6728d5f599f1c9741560ca6fe24b158a5/vscode-remote-resource%3Fpath=/home/user/projects/card1/css/style.css

URL was taken from the preview card option in BAS.

Regards,

Omri

entry.title: Re: difference in MCA ( Multi currency accounting) and Fo...
entry.content:
Hello, I could not come up with any blog post but the this link can help you understand MCA as well as FCV. 

Thank You.

entry.title: Re: How to send pdf file in binary format to ECM
entry.content:
Hi,

Were you able to resolve this issue? I am also facing same issue handling PDF. Word and Text documents works fine, but PDFs are sent as blank pages to target system.

If your issue is resolved, can you please share the fix?

Thanks.

entry.title: Re: Build your app (new UI)?
entry.content: I'm a bit confused as to what the minimum cost would cost to upgrade to have this functionality back.  I saw a a page for developers says $13,020 base package which is a non starter for an individual trying to build an app. Is there some other pricing that I'm missing?

entry.title: Re: Is there a T-Code / Process knowledge & Training data...
entry.content:
Hi @ArnoudHoltzer 
If I understand your inquiry correctly, it's not about learning content but about functionality.
If yo, i recommend to post this in our Would it then be ok to ask the user to ask their question in the

Enterprise Resource Planning Q&A board: From the on-premise suite to modular cloud ERP, SAP ECC and SAP Business One to SAP S/4HANA Cloud, this is the place for asking questions and finding answers.

Best regards
Margit

entry.title: Re: Classification class value list restriction?
entry.content:
Hi @Connie__ 

 

In an Onpremise system this is possible through the use of organizational areas ( Outlined in the note

https://me.sap.com/notes/1073116 ) but in S/4HANA Cloud this is not available and there is no equivalent

 

Please submit a feature request if you would like it added

 

Best Regards

Enda

entry.title: Re: No application class found for URI: /sap/bc/cts/transportchecks
entry.content:
Hi schneidermic0,

I am facing a similar issue with a REST resource that I have created. Can you enlighten me a bit what exactly is the reason for this issue? Can it be from actual code implementation of resource application controller?

Thanks

entry.title: Re: Inventory Posting List hang even in SAP integration w...
entry.content: SAP Note 3360703 for Hana is not listed in the content fixes of latest SBO Patch 2408. That means there is no fix for Hana yet.

entry.title: Re: ODN number appears should appear in the Alt. Refer. f...
entry.content:
Hello Santosh,

Going by my understanding as guided by you, please find the screenshots for DR and DG documents. DR is updating the Alt. refer field and DG is updating the Reference field. Kindly help. Thank you!

entry.title: Re: RACI matrix
entry.content:
Hi @johanC

If you are looking for learning material I recommend our free Getting Started with Learning and Enablement in SAP Projects learning journey - There you can find in Unit 5 Setting up an SAP Enablement Team a dedicated section Specifying Responsibilities and Skills per Role where the Enablement Role Description with RACI and Skills Matrix is explained:
I requested to move your question  to the Technology Q&A board. This is the perfect place for your inquiry: From SAP BTP and ABAP Cloud to SAP NetWeaver and SAP BW - Q&A  covered with answers to questions about new technology and legacy systems. There the requestor can directly exchange with experienced experts. Our SAP Learning Group shall be used to get answers to questions about our learning journeys, certification preparation, and to reach learning goals.

Kind regards
Margit




-

entry.title: Re: Reversal of stock posting after resetting the UD with...
entry.content:
Hi @Suresh_Eswaran 

 

Reversing the stock posting after a Usage Decision is not possible but moving the stock as outline

the note https://me.sap.com/notes/2695182 using "Transfer Stock- In-Plant" (Fiori-ID F1061) is the only alternative.

 

Best Regards

Enda

entry.title: Re: Inventory Posting List hang even in SAP integration w...
entry.content:
Hi kedalenechong,

This is not how it works.

Why would overview note of SP2408 will contain SAP Note 3360703 while the issue is already fixed in SP2311?

Overview note of SP2408 will only contain the SAP Notes which are fixed in SP2408 only.

You should check the following:

3383027 - Overview Note for SAP Business One 10.0 SP 2311, version for SAP HANA

Kind regards,

ANKIT CHAUHAN

SAP Business One Support

entry.title: Position management- Shared Positions vs Regular
entry.content: Hello Everyone, we are looking into to implement Position management and the question come up if we shall change from Regular position to shared positions. What would be a disadvantage or the impact of it? Thx

entry.title: Re: ‘ABAP Unit’ Test…Initial few Steps before the SPRINT!!
entry.content:
Is there really no way to run a local test class in SAP GUI (or SE80). It seems the "Execute" option in the right-click context menu is missing for local classes and ADT is the only option!?!

 

UPDATE: Just found it in the top menu under Program -> Execute!

entry.title: Unable to convert an SAP Script as a PDF and send it via OData (for PDF Viewer Functionality)
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

Apologies if the question is a bit vague; but I am struggling to achieve; is to convert an existing SAP Script Output to a PDF and then send that PDF via ODATA ( using Media handling ) .

The Output is a PO output designed on SAP Script. So the way I am converting it to a PDF is as follows:

1. Find out the NAST Record for a given Output
2. Using the NAST Record; get the Spool ID.
3. Using FM - RSPO_RETURN_SPOOLJOB get the OTF Data
4. Using FM - CONVERT_OTF_2_PDF converting the ODT to PDF data
5. Then converting the PDF data to XSTRING and then passing that to my get_stream method as below:

Logic for converting SAP Script to PDF:

However when I test the Get_Stream method using /iwfnd/gw_client ; I get the following error:

Please advise where could I be going wrong?

Regards,

Pablo Ghosh Roy

Thank you

entry.title: Re: ODN number appears should appear in the Alt. Refer. f...
entry.content: Hello and thanks for the findings. What the snapshots show is quite contrary to what is stated in the SAP notes. I would recommend to create an incident in such scenario as it may require further investigation into your system. Thank You.

entry.content:

General Preview:

entry.title: Re: NC Disposition via SAPME PAPI: Find Disposition Options
entry.content: Hello Andrew, thanks for the answer. The usage of the NC priority is our current workaround. For a permanent solution we plan to use the Read NC Code request to get the right disposition option instead of the find disposition request.

entry.title: Re: Can I have SAP learning portal in dark mode?
entry.content:
Hi @gyadav 
Currently I do not find any option to change the layout induvial setting.
I passed your inquiry to our experts and keep you posted on any updates related to thi.
Kind regards
Margit

entry.title: Re: How to create a worklist with learnings ? Is there a...
entry.content:
Hi @CORNELIUSP 
SAP Learning currently does not support such functionality.
I passed your feedback to the SAP expert who is exploring such options to support on the product in future.
Kind regards
Margit

entry.title: Re: ODN number appears should appear in the Alt. Refer. f...
entry.content: Hello Santosh, Thanks again! Will update if a solution is found or of any new development.

entry.title: Re: Horizon Theme and Templates for Stories in SAP Analytics Cloud
entry.content: Thanks @amrithar30 for your question. This warning should normally not prevent the import from still going through.

entry.title: Re: How to create a worklist with learnings ? Is there a...
entry.content: Would be great to see that feature so that it is easier to focus on the learnings that are important and that you can define your own backlog for learning.

entry.title: Re: Build process on webide fails: Error occured during c...
entry.content:
I previously had a similar error and what worked for me was to change the host name (etc/hosts) from hxehost.mydomain to just hxehost and to use hxehost as the host name when prompted in the binary install of SAP HANA, express edition.
Hope that helps,
Dan

entry.title: Re: Unable to convert an SAP Script as a PDF and send it via OData (for PDF Viewer Functionality)
entry.content: It's not "vague", it's a very detailed question if you compare it to the majority of questions, bravo!

entry.title: Re: SAP BTP PostgreSQL Database import to pgAdmin with SSH Tunnel (Local Access)
entry.content: @satish_kumar_kara First of all, sorry for the late reply. Can you make sure that you successfully connect to Cloud Foundry with 'cf login' and select space? Sometimes, it could be a problem to login with 'cf login'. In such circumstances, you can try to change your BTP account password then you can login with 'cf login' again. This password-changing process generally fixes this problem.

entry.title: Re: Number Range for Material Type
entry.content: Hello Tum, Thankyou so much for entire explination .But i asked for s4 hana where i couldnot find to create this in public cloud

entry.title: Create scales By BOI I_PurchasingInfoRecordTP
entry.content:
I created a test program and a info record was created, but the scales not exits though test value prepared. 


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: Create scales By BOI I_PurchasingInfoRecordTP
entry.content:
Hello,

Manage Purchasing Info Records does not contain all the features/functionalities that is found in webgui tiles.

As you could see in the Fiori library, you can create info records for the different item category types and scales are not supported.

For more information you can refer to the below link:

https://community.sap.com/t5/enterprise-resource-planning-q-a/manage-purchasing-info-record-does-not-display-scales-information-for/qaq-p/12557318

 

Thanks

entry.title: Re: Task 3 - Enhancing CDS View Entities with Annotations
entry.content: My solution
